content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/node-remediation-console/source/src/copiedFromConsole/utils/status-box.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 45
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   44                onClick={window.location.reload.bind(window.location)}
   45                variant="link"
   46                isInline

```

### Fix 2
Line: 214
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-color-200' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-color-200

Code context:
```
  213          <Data data={data} {...dataProps}>
  214            <div className="pf-v5-u-color-200">
  215              {t("Timed out fetching new data. The data below is stale.")}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 42
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: react-i18next
  parentName: Trans

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   41              Please{" "}
   42              <Button
   43                type="button"

```

### Fix 4
Line: 184
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

Code context:
```
  183        return (
  184          <PageSection variant="light">
  185            <Title headingLevel="h1">{t("404: Not Found")}</Title>

```

### Fix 5
Line: 214
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-color-200' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-color-200

Code context:
```
  213          <Data data={data} {...dataProps}>
  214            <div className="pf-v5-u-color-200">
  215              {t("Timed out fetching new data. The data below is stale.")}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/node-remediation-console/source/src/copiedFromConsole/utils/status-box.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 45):** `Button variant="link"` — The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). The only change is the addition of `'stateful'`. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2 (Line 214):** CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` was removed with no equivalent. Need to remove or replace. Since there's no PF6 equivalent, I'll use PatternFly's `Content` component or just use custom styling. Looking at context — this is a subdued text color for stale data message. The simplest correct approach is to use a PatternFly `Content` component with a `component="p"` or just inline style. Actually, the simplest minimal change is to remove the class entirely since there's no replacement, or use a custom CSS approach. Let me use `style={{ color: 'var(--pf-t--global--color--status--info--default)' }}` or similar. Actually, the cleanest PatternFly v6 approach for muted/secondary text color would be `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle`. Let me just remove the dead class and use a PF token via inline style for the muted color effect.

**Fix 3 (Line 42):** Icon children to `icon` prop on Button. Looking at the code, this Button (lines 42-49) contains only text "try again" — no icon. It's inside a `<Trans>` component. The rule fired because the parent is `Trans` from `react-i18next`, but the Button itself has no icon children. **No change needed** — there's no icon to move.

**Fix 4 (Line 184):** `PageSection variant="light"` → `"light"` is no longer valid. The suggested replacements are `"default"` or `"secondary"`. `"light"` maps semantically to `"default"` (it was the light/white background variant). Change to `variant="default"`.

**Fix 5 (Line 214):** Same as Fix 2 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removal. Already handled by Fix 2.

Now let me apply the changes:
Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct with both edits applied. Let me verify there are no unused imports or other artifacts from the changes:

- No imports were added or removed — all existing imports are still used.
- The `className` prop on the `<div>` at line 214 was replaced with `style`, which requires no new imports.
- No dead code was introduced.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"` — no existing value was removed. |
| **Fix 2** | `pf-v5-u-color-200` CSS class removed (sd-css-dead-class) | **Applied** | Line 214: Replaced `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` with `style={{ color: "var(--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle)" }}` using the PF6 design token for subtle/secondary text color, since the utility class was removed with no PF6 equivalent. |
| **Fix 3** | Icon children to `icon` prop on Button | **No change needed** | The `<Button>` at line 42 contains only the text `"try again"` — there is no icon element among its children. The rule fired because of the `<Trans>` parent context, but no icon migration is applicable here. |
| **Fix 4** | `PageSection variant="light"` value removed | **Applied** | Line 184: Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"`. The `"light"` value (white/light background) maps semantically to `"default"` in PF6. |
| **Fix 5** | `pf-v5-u-color-200` CSS class removed (semver-css-class-removed) | **Already applied** | Same location and same class as Fix 2 — already handled. |

chunks.response:
The file looks correct with both edits applied. Let me verify there are no unused imports or other artifacts from the changes:

- No imports were added or removed — all existing imports are still used.
- The `className` prop on the `<div>` at line 214 was replaced with `style`, which requires no new imports.
- No dead code was introduced.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"` — no existing value was removed. |
| **Fix 2** | `pf-v5-u-color-200` CSS class removed (sd-css-dead-class) | **Applied** | Line 214: Replaced `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` with `style={{ color: "var(--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle)" }}` using the PF6 design token for subtle/secondary text color, since the utility class was removed with no PF6 equivalent. |
| **Fix 3** | Icon children to `icon` prop on Button | **No change needed** | The `<Button>` at line 42 contains only the text `"try again"` — there is no icon element among its children. The rule fired because of the `<Trans>` parent context, but no icon migration is applicable here. |
| **Fix 4** | `PageSection variant="light"` value removed | **Applied** | Line 184: Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"`. The `"light"` value (white/light background) maps semantically to `"default"` in PF6. |
| **Fix 5** | `pf-v5-u-color-200` CSS class removed (semver-css-class-removed) | **Already applied** | Same location and same class as Fix 2 — already handled. |
